package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for errgroup_fanout_without_limit_in_handler: errgroup goroutine fanout without a visible concurrency limit in handlers.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: gin; severity: contextual.
type Rule312NegativeRecord struct {
	Name string
}

type Rule312NegativeService interface {
	Handle(context.Context, Rule312NegativeRecord) (Rule312NegativeRecord, error)
}

func scenario312Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule312NegativeService, input Rule312NegativeRecord) (Rule312NegativeRecord, int) {
	output, err := service.Handle(ctx, input)
	if err != nil {
		return Rule312NegativeRecord{}, http.StatusBadRequest
	}
	return output, http.StatusOK
}
